schemes.benefit_en: Rs 25 lakh/year health insurance for every family in Rajasthan
schemes.benefit_hi: राजस्थान के प्रत्येक परिवार को ₹25 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा
schemes.eligibility: All Rajasthan residents (BPL: free; others: Rs 850/year premium)

schemes.name_en: Indira Gandhi Shehri Rojgar Guarantee Yojana
schemes.name_hi: इंदिरा गांधी शहरी रोजगार गारंटी योजना
schemes.benefit_en: 100 days guaranteed employment per year for urban families
schemes.benefit_hi: शहरी परिवारों को 100 दिन रोजगार की गारंटी

schemes.benefit_en: 50% subsidy (up to Rs 40,000) on fencing to protect farmland
schemes.eligibility: Rajasthan farmers with minimum 0.5 hectare land

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 1500/month for guardians raising orphan/destitute children
schemes.eligibility: Guardians raising orphan, destitute or disabled children
